race.description: Tab Agents Association Of Nsw Hcp (C1)
race.comment: Solid Class 1. GORGEOUS (3) resumes. Started hard in the market on debut when she savaged the line to salute over 1150m at Randwick Kensington on January 14. Tipped straight out and returns with a sharp 818m Warwick Farm trial win. Well drawn and looks destined for stronger company. POISONOUS (1) returned from a lengthy break when taken straight to the front for a slick victory over 1100m at this track in Maiden grade. Tricky map today and has the speed to slide across. Respect. CHARKA (8) fourth-up for this after she struggled to close off with a disappointing fourth over 900m at Newcastle. Extra trip in her favour and best figures measure up nicely. Improver. ALL THE WAY MAE (7) returns from a six-month break. Struggled in all three runs last time in and appears to be back to her best with a solid trial placing over 800m. Each way.
